description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent gable roof and an attached garage at the front. The main structure is surrounded by a paved driveway and a landscaped area with several trees lining one side. A wooden deck and a swimming pool are visible at the rear, providing outdoor leisure space. The exterior walls are finished in light colors, contrasting with the dark roof and wooden deck. Multiple windows are distributed along the facades, allowing ample natural light inside. The overall design is modern yet functional, with clear zones for living, parking, and recreation.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a gable roof, attached garage, wooden deck, and swimming pool, surrounded by a paved driveway and landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the attached garage, main entrance, and a row of trees along the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the driveway, the row of trees, and the swimming pool at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, swimming pool, and back facade with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the alignment of trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
